  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs us man faſ-
kat: Mehs palaischainees us
to KUNGU muhſu Deeiwu/ neg
wiꞥſch tas vats irr/ ka Augstu-
nus un Altaeus Iſtijus irr no-
nehmis/ un irr uhs Juhdu un
Jerusaletni fazzijis: Preeksch fchi
Altara/ kas Jerusaletme irr/ buhs
jums klannitees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ falihgſti jelle ar
mannu Kungu to Rehninan no
Affirijas/ un es dohſchu tew di-
wi tuhkſtoschus Sirgus/ arrig
tu warrefi fewim Jahtneekus us
teein doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka tu tad weenu weeni-
gu Kungu no manna Kunga ma-
sakeem Kalpeem atpakkat Dſihſi?
bet tu patanijees us Egipti/ to
Rattn un Jahtneeku deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Woj tu dohma/ ka es bes
ta KUNGGA efinu prett fcho Wee-
tu zehlees/ to paschu tamaitaht?
tas KUNGS irr us man fazz-
ijis: Zellees prett fcho Semini/
un tamaita to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Elijakims Il-
kijus Dehls/ un Sebena/ un Jo-
aks/ us Rabsaku: Runna jelle
ar taweem Kalpeem ſihrifki/ mehs
to gann prohtam/ un ne runna
juddifki ar mums preekſch to Lau-
schu Ausim/ kas us to Muhri irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Rabsakus fazzija
teem: Irrag mans Kungs ni
pee tawu Kungu/ un pee t
fuhtijs fchohs Wahrdus ru
naht? neggi pee teem Wihree
kas us to Muhri stahw/ jo tee
jums famus Guhdus chdihs/
fawas Mihselas dsers.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta stahweja Rabsak
nn fauze ar stipru Balti judi
kt/ un.runnaja/un fazzija: Kla
fajt to Wahrdut ta leela Reh
na/ ta kehutixa no Affirtjas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta takka tas Rehnins
Laid Iſtijus juhs ne peewilt/
wiꞥſch ne warrehs juhs no m
nas Rohkas isglahbt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid arridsan Iſtij
jums ne darra Zerribu us
KUNGU/ ka tas buhtu fazzij
Tas KUNGS muhs isglahbt
nn ne dohs fcho Pilsfahbtu
Rehnina no Affirijas Rohka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne klaufajt pehz Iſtij
Jo ta fakka tas Rehninsch no L
firijas: Modohdeetees mani
Schehlastibai/ un tseite pee m
ahra/ tad ehdihs ikkatrs no
wa Wihna-Rohka/ un ikkatrs
fawa Wihges-Rohka/ un ikka
dsers Uhdeni no fawas Akka
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kamehr es nahku un wo
du juhs weenâ Semine/ ka ju
fu Semme irr/ tahdâ Semm
kur Labbiha/ un Wihs irr/ ta
da Semme/ kur Maife un W
na-Dahrſi irr/ tahdâ Sem
kur Etjes-Rohki/ Etje un M
dus irr/ tad palikfeet juhs dſihu
un ne mirfeet. Bet Iſtijum
"
    }
